title: Weathered Wells
description: A multi-loader Minecraft mod that adds weathered wells scattered across the world, each hiding a unique totem that grants permanent water-healing abilities.
body:
## 🏚️ Weathered Wells - Discover Ancient Wells, Heal in Water

**Explore the world, find hidden totems in ancient wells, and gain permanent water-healing abilities!**

Weathered Wells adds five unique well structures scattered across your world. Each well hides an underground chamber with a chest containing a collectible totem. Gather all three totems to unlock powerful, permanent water-healing buffs.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🏗️ 5 Well Structures
- **Forgotten Well** — A weathered wooden structure found near water
- **Mossy Well** — An overgrown well with a deep underground chamber
- **Dry Well** — A large, deteriorated stone structure with vegetation
- **Clear Well** — A pristine white structure with clean architecture
- **Sunken Well** — Partially submerged underwater
- Wells generate naturally throughout the world with 300+ blocks spacing
- Each well has an above-ground section connected to an underground chamber

### 🔮 3 Collectible Totems
Each well chest contains one random totem:
- **Soaked Totem** — A waterlogged artifact
- **Clear Totem** — A crystal-clear relic
- **Deep Totem** — An artifact from the depths

### 🏆 Advancements
- **Water Seeps In** — Obtain a Soaked Totem
- **Clarity Settles** — Obtain a Clear Totem
- **Depths Endured** — Obtain a Deep Totem
- **At Home in Water** — Collect all three totems
- **Wells Explored** — Visit all five well structures

### 💧 Permanent Water-Healing Buffs
Each advancement grants **"Blessing of the Waterways"** buffs:

**Lingering (Levels I–III)**:
- Heals when standing in water after an activation delay
- Higher levels reduce healing interval (3s → 2.5s → 2s)
- Heals 0.5 hearts per interval
- Automatically levels up as you collect different totems

**Attunement**:
- Granted upon collecting all three totems
- Reduces activation delay from 5 seconds to 2 seconds
- Stacks with Lingering for faster, more responsive healing

**Immersion**:
- Granted upon discovering all five well types
- Water breathing, faster underwater movement and mining

All buffs are **permanent** and **persist through death**.

---

## 📖 How to Play

1. **Explore the World**: Search for weathered wells throughout the landscape
2. **Find the Wells**: Look for five unique well structures in various biomes
3. **Descend Underground**: Each well connects to a hidden underground chamber
4. **Collect the Totems**: Open the chest to obtain a random totem
5. **Earn Advancements**: Each new totem type triggers an advancement and grants a buff
6. **Collect All Three**: Gathering all three totems unlocks the Attunement buff
7. **Heal in Water**: Stand in water to activate your permanent healing abilities!

---

## 🛠️ Technical Details

### Multi-Loader Support
This mod supports **multiple mod loaders and versions**!
- **Fabric** and **NeoForge** for Minecraft 1.21.1, 1.21.3–1.21.11
- **Fabric** and **Forge** for Minecraft 1.20.1
- Download the correct version for your mod loader
- Shared codebase ensures consistent experience across loaders

### Requirements
- **Fabric**: Fabric Loader with Fabric API
- **NeoForge**: NeoForge (1.21.1+)
- **Forge**: Forge (1.20.1 only)

### Compatibility
- Works alongside other world generation mods
- Compatible with performance mods (Sodium, Starlight, etc.)
- No conflicts with other mods — uses only vanilla blocks for structures

---

## 🐛 Bug Reports & Suggestions

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Report it on our [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ksoichiro/WeatheredWells/issues) page!

---
